_doc: Schema contract between bristlenose.pipeline_view.render.PipelineView (Python) and the React Pipeline Settings tab (TypeScript). v4 / schema 4 (4 Jun): eligibility + quality resolve at (provider, model) grain. llm_summary removed; each stage's alternatives is a flat list of per-model ModelAvailability rows (provider_id, model_id, provider_display, provider_display_key, publisher, synthesised, reason_key, action_key, quality/quality_note/quality_source, default, recommended). Synthesised rows carry user-settings models the catalogue doesn't rate (Azure deployment, pulled Ollama models, dispatched-not-catalogued). Schema-additive history: v1 (18 May) read-only; v2 (21 May) llm_summary + alternatives; v3 (24-25 May) quality + default + recommended. Older consumers ignore unknown fields.

claude_apple_silicon_keys_present._doc: Common cohort path: Apple Silicon Mac, Claude provider with key, no PII redaction. v4: eligibility + quality resolve at (provider, model) grain; each LLM stage carries per-model rows (Claude shows Sonnet 4 default + Opus 4 recommended). Claude Sonnet 4 cells flagged default=true; Opus 4 + gpt-4o flagged recommended=true (first time recommended != default). Transcription + anonymisation keep provider-grain rows (model_id null).

linux_cpu_no_keys._doc: Linux x86_64, no provider keys, no Ollama, no Apple Silicon. Every LLM provider row is unavailable with a fixable action_key (api_key / ollama_running). Transcription falls back to faster-whisper (ctranslate2 present). Quality glyphs empty on unavailable rows.

ollama_only_with_quality_marginals._doc: Apple Silicon, no provider keys, Ollama running with pulled models, Local provider chosen. Local cells: good for structural stages (speaker/topic), marginal for synthesis stages (quote/cluster/theme) — the v4 split that deleted the v1.5 llm_summary dedup. Pulled-but-uncatalogued Ollama models appear as synthesised rows (synthesised=true, quality=null).

f66_unrated_declared_model._doc: F66 edge: Claude provider with a dispatched model the catalogue doesn't list (claude-opus-5-future). The chosen model appears as a synthesised row (synthesised=true, quality=null) marked aria-current; the catalogued Sonnet 4 / Opus 4 rows still render. Exercises the dispatched-not-catalogued synthesis path and the untested-quality Why fallback.
